The tested change is UI/rendering/accessibility focused; no prompt, routing, data grounding, or response parsing behavior changed in this release.

completedImprovements.title: NLQ entity extraction route build regression fixed before production release
completedImprovements.evidence: Removed incompatible explicit nodejs runtime segment config; npm run build/type-check/lint/test:quick/test:contract passed before v8.11.124 release.

notes: v8.11.123 tag pipeline 2513728658 failed during frontend deploy because Next.js cacheComponents rejected export const runtime = 'nodejs' in src/app/api/ai/nlq/extract-entities/route.ts.
The route runtime declaration was removed and verified with npm run build, npm run type-check, npm run lint, npm run test:quick, and npm run test:contract.
v8.11.124 tag pipeline 2513741959 succeeded and production /api/version returned commit cf5480e855ff2476c928b7ff7f4399c664ff70ea.
